name: public-job-board-change-monitor-actor
title: Public Job Board Change Monitor
description: Monitor public career pages for job-level additions and removals without logging in or scraping private accounts.

pages.title: Public job pages
pages.description: Public career pages or job board result pages to inspect. Do not provide login-only or private URLs.

url.title: Page URL
url.description: Public career or job-board page URL.

html.title: Optional HTML
html.description: Optional saved HTML for offline tests or controlled runs.

previous_jobs.title: Previous jobs
previous_jobs.description: Optional previous job records with title, url, and signature fields for change detection.

output.title: Public job board change results
output.description: Default dataset containing normalized job records and new, unchanged, or removed change records.

results.title: Results
results.description: Default dataset records produced by the actor.

record_type.title: Record type
record_type.description: Either job for a current listing or change for a diff event.

url.title: Job URL
url.description: Absolute URL for the job listing when available.

signature.title: Signature
signature.description: Stable title and URL signature for future comparisons.

change_type.title: Change type
change_type.description: new, unchanged, or removed for change records.
